{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Stellar Synthesis Labs
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Stellar Synthesis Labs]] ordered a [[Temporal Prism]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c20">''The Engineer'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
